prompt: Replace the QR code corners with stylized floral patterns, keeping the digital look while adding a natural contrast.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the QR code's large square finder patterns at the top-left, top-right, and bottom-left corners with stylized floral patterns. The floral designs should retain a digital appearance while providing a natural visual contrast against the existing QR code elements.
objects: Stylized floral pattern at top-left corner
Stylized floral pattern at top-right corner
Stylized floral pattern at bottom-left corner
QR code's large square finder pattern at top-left (should not be present)
QR code's large square finder pattern at top-right (should not be present)
QR code's large square finder pattern at bottom-left (should not be present)
